zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Pannell於1251年出生在英國英格蘭素可堂寧頓時，她的父親William Pannell26歲，母親Mary22歲。她於大約1276年與John Drakes在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Pannell于1251年出生在英国英格兰素可堂寧頓时，她的父亲William Pannell26岁，母亲Mary22岁。她于大约1276年与John Drakes在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和2个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Pannell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: possibly from Middle English panel, panel(l)e ‘cloth, saddle-cloth, saddle’ or ‘pane (of glass)’, hence a metonymic occupational name for a maker of such items.
from the Middle English personal name Paynel (Old French Payenel, Latin Paganellus), a pet form of Payne (from Latin Paganus).

variants.name: Payne
meanings: English: from the Middle English and Old French personal name Pai(e)n, Pagen (from Latin Paganus), a fairly common personal name among Normans. It derived from a word that originally meant ‘villager, rustic’, later ‘heathen’, but it had doubtless lost these connotations in its use as a late medieval personal name. This name has also been established in Ireland since the 14th century.

History: Thomas Payne, who was a freeman of Plymouth Colony in 1639, was the founder of a large American family, which included Robert Treat Paine (1731–1814), one of the signers of the Declaration of Independence. See also   Paine  .

nameMeanings.name: Mary
meanings: Hebrew: Bitter; Marion is the French form.

variants.name: Marion
meanings: Originally a medieval French diminutive form of Marie , introduced to Britain in the Middle Ages. In some places it was taken as a pet form of Margaret or Margery . As a male name, it is an altered form of the Continental male name Marian, a derivative of Latin Marianus (from Marius ), but is now rarely, if ever, used. It was the birth name of the American film star John Wayne ( 1907–79 ).

variants.name: Marcia
meanings: Often used as a feminine equivalent of Mark , but in fact a feminine form of Marcius, itself a derivative of Marcus . One St Marcia is commemorated in a group with Felix, Luciolus, Fortunatus, and others; another with Zenais, Cyria, and Valeria; and a third with Ariston, Crescentian, Eutychian, Urban, Vitalis, Justus, Felicissimus, Felix, and Symphorosa. None is individually very famous.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Pannell was born in 1251, in Donnington, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, her father, William Pannell, was 26 and her mother, Mary, was 22. She married John Drakes about 1276, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Pannell est née en 1251, à Donnington, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Pannell, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Mary, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé John Drakes environ 1276, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Pannell 1251 in Donnington, Sussex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Pannell 26 und ihre Mutter Mary 22. Sie hat um 1276 in Yorkshire, England John Drakes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Pannell è nata il nel 1251 nel Donnington, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William Pannell, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Mary, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato John Drakes circa 1276, nel Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Pannellが1251年にイギリスイギリススセックスドニントンで生まれた時，父William Pannellは26歳，母Maryは22歳であった。約1276年にイギリスヨークシュアイアでJohn Drakesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Pannell(이)가 1251년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 도닝턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Pannell(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 대략 1276년 영국 요르크실르에서 John Drakes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Pannell nasceu em 1251, em Donnington, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Pannell, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Mary, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com John Drakes aproximadamente 1276, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Pannell родилась в 1251 г. в местности доннингтон, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Pannell было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Drakes около 1276 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Pannell nació en 1251, en Donnington, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Pannell, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Mary, tenía 22 años. Se casó con John Drakes aproximadamente 1276, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas.
